visual_description: A young boy with short, light-colored hair stands in a dimly lit room, seen from behind. He is wearing a red and green striped sweater and is holding a long, thin object, possibly a knife, in his right hand. He is facing a closed door, with a lit lamp on a side table to his left and a bookshelf to his right.
audio_description: A high-pitched, sustained electronic tone, similar to a dial tone or a test signal, is audible throughout the clip.
